allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./server/db'\); const {all} = db; console.log\(Object.keys\(all\('SELECT * FROM tests LIMIT 1'\)[0] || {}\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./server/db'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(all\('SELECT * FROM tests LIMIT 1'\)[0]||{}\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {all}=require\('./server/db'\); const t=all\('SELECT id, title, is_active, is_draft FROM tests'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all}=require\('./server/db'\); console.log\('Tests:', all\('SELECT id,title,is_active,is_draft FROM tests'\).length\); console.log\('CardSets:', all\('SELECT id,title,is_active FROM flashcard_sets'\).map\(s=>s.title+' active='+s.is_active\)\)")
